---
name: Framework contribution proposal
about: Propose a new compliance framework to be added to SWAO
title: "[FRAMEWORK] "
labels: framework-contribution
assignees: ''
---

## Framework name and standard body

What is the full name of the framework, and which organisation or standards body publishes it?

Example: "NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5 -- National Institute of Standards and Technology"

## Link to public specification

Provide a link to the publicly available specification or standard. Frameworks with a freely accessible specification are prioritised.

## Why this framework matters for cloud migration

Explain briefly why this framework is relevant to cloud migration assessments and why SWAO users would benefit from its inclusion. Consider: geography, sector, regulatory requirement, or adoption breadth.

## Are you willing to contribute the YAML controls?

SWAO framework contributions are YAML-only -- no TypeScript required. Please indicate below:

- [ ] Yes, I can contribute the `framework-meta.yaml` and `controls.yaml` files
- [ ] I can contribute partial content (controls subset or metadata only)
- [ ] No, I am proposing the framework only -- I am not able to contribute the files myself

If you are contributing: please read the [Contributing guide](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) for the framework YAML format before opening a PR.
